_comment: Scoring formula weights. volume_weight=0 disables raw-record-volume scoring until accurate volume data is available. base_feed_points gives every assigned feed a baseline score. sheet_type_multipliers boost or discount feeds by source sheet (LeadList courts are more complex; State_SME is territory reference only).
_dqs_team_comment: Canonical full names of DQS (Data Quality Specialist) analysts. Analysts in this list (or with zero primary/LL feed credits) are grouped under the DQS Workload table.
_name_aliases_comment: Explicit name mappings for analysts whose name appears differently in the spreadsheet (e.g. maiden vs married name). Key = name as it appears in Excel, value = canonical display name.
_other_teams_comment: Analysts on external teams (Team Kennedy, etc.) — excluded from all workload output entirely.
_partial_data_comment: Analysts whose full workload is not yet charted here. Shown in their team table with [partial] tag but excluded from deviation calculations.
_departed_comment: Analysts who have left the company. Shown with [departed] tag so reviewers know to clean up the sheet.
_cross_collab_comment: Analysts from other teams who cross-collaborate. Shown with [cross-collab] tag, excluded from team averages.
_other_roles_comment: Non-DA/DQS roles (e.g. Senior Biz Ops). Shown with [biz-ops] tag, excluded from team averages.
_philippines_team_comment: Canonical names of Auie's Philippines-based DA team. All other DAs default to the US team (Kiara + Josefina).
